# Filesystem Error Handling Test
# Tests error scenarios and security restrictions

# Build the filesystem server binary
go build -o mcp-filesystem-server .

# Create a temporary test directory
mkdir test_dir
cd test_dir

# Test error handling scenarios
exec ../mcp-filesystem-server . <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{"roots":{"listChanged":true},"sampling":{}}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"read_file","arguments":{"path":"nonexistent.txt"}},"id":3}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"read_file","arguments":{"path":"../../../etc/passwd"}},"id":4}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"list_directory","arguments":{"path":"/etc"}},"id":5}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"write_file","arguments":{"path":"../outside.txt","content":"test"}},"id":6}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"read_file","arguments":{}},"id":7}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"write_file","arguments":{"path":"test.txt"}},"id":8}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_file_info","arguments":{"path":"/root"}},"id":9}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"invalid_tool","arguments":{}},"id":10}
EOF

# Verify file not found error
stdout 'failed to read file'

# Verify access denied errors
stdout 'access denied.*outside allowed directories'

# Verify missing argument errors
stdout 'missing required argument.*path'
stdout 'missing required argument.*content'

# Verify tool not found error
stdout '"error"'
stdout 'method not found'

# Cleanup
cd ..
rm -rf test_dir

# Test starting server without arguments (should fail)
! exec ./mcp-filesystem-server
